sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.10 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: (P.\,Neumann). Can the free group on two generators be embedded in${ Sym}\,({ N})$so that the image of every non-identity element has only a finite number of orbits? { A.\,M.\,W.\,Glass} Yes, it can (H.\,D.\,Macpherson, in: Ordered groups and infinite permutation groups, Partially based on Conf. Luminy, France, 1993\/ (Mathematics and its Applications, { 354}), Kluwer, Dordrecht, 1996, 221--230).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
